changes.file: /home/polaris/wt/flywheel/src/polaris_graph/generator/multi_section_generator.py:3759 (rule #4, the taught conjunction form) and the SECTION_SYSTEM_PROMPT_TEMPLATE_FIELD_AGNOSTIC block at :3751-3761; bundle extraction reusing evidence_value_extractor.py / numeric_comparator.py

changes.change: New env PG_COMPARISON_BUNDLES (default OFF). Pre-pass normalizes evidence rows by (outcome measure, unit of analysis, geography, horizon, industry, method) — deterministic extraction where fields exist, one batched LLM call for the rest — and groups rows measuring the same outcome into COMPARISON BUNDLES. Each section prompt gains a block listing its bundles: 'BUNDLE: wage effects, task-level, US vs EU — ev_012 reports +14%, ev_034 reports -3%. For each bundle write ONE conjunction sentence citing all members (rule #4 form), then ONE hedged interpretive sentence citing the same members.' The conjunction passes the existing gate; the interpretation is exactly what C2 admits. Bundle labels also seed C3's H3 headers and the table renderer's (measure,unit) keys — three consumers, one pre-pass.
changes.dimension: insight (0.32) + comprehensiveness (0.29) — turns coverage into contrast
changes.expected_points: +0.5 to +1.2 overall, contingent on C2 being on (without it the interpretive half of each bundle pair still dies at the gate and only the conjunctions land).
changes.how_it_fails: (a) The corpus may not bundle — econ literature with heterogeneous outcomes could yield 2-3 thin bundles; the cheap test measures this before any compose. (b) Bad normalization pairs incomparable numbers (employment LEVEL vs GROWTH) and the writer conjoins them misleadingly — the conjunction is span-true per source but the juxtaposition is wrong; mitigate with a unit-equality hard requirement in the bundler. (c) Prompt bloat pushes the section call over the token budget.
changes.test: Bundle-only dry run on the cached Rank10 evidence pool (one batched LLM call, ~1 min): assert >=6 bundles with >=2 members each and unit-equal members. Then one single-section live smoke: generate ONE section with the block on and assert the share of kept sentences citing >=2 distinct ev_ids rises above the Rank10 baseline for that section.

changes.name: Question-frame integration (4IR as organizing frame, not scenery)
changes.file: /home/polaris/wt/flywheel/src/polaris_graph/generator/multi_section_generator.py:1739-1755 (_select_outline_system_prompt) and the skeleton addendum at :1003 (role 1, the framing section); section prompt template at :3751
changes.seam: Two graded criteria (instruction-following w=0.15 'Integration of AI as a Key Driver of the 4IR'; comprehensiveness w=0.10 'Grounding in the 4IR Context') demand the review discuss AI WITHIN the frame; the Rank10 body mentions it 4 times as name-drops. The reference OPENS with it.
changes.change: New env PG_QUESTION_FRAME_INTEGRATION (default OFF). Deterministically extract the FRAME clause from the research question (the appositive/'as a'-clause — here 'AI as a key driver of the Fourth Industrial Revolution'); inject it into (a) the skeleton's role-1 framing section ('the opening section must situate the subject within the question's stated frame, grounded in assigned evidence') and (b) each section prompt as a soft directive: 'where the assigned evidence itself references the question's frame, connect the section's findings to it; NEVER assert the frame connection without evidence support.' The evidence pool demonstrably contains 4IR material (4 body mentions survive verification today), so framed sentences remain span-groundable. Question-driven extraction, no hardcoded topic string — generalizes.
changes.dimension: instruction-following (0.25) + comprehensiveness (0.29) — two named criteria totaling 0.25 of combined dimension weight where we score near-zero

changes.how_it_fails: PRIOR NEGATIVE APPLIES MOST HERE: the one previous 'insight directive' A/B lost 3.5 points. If the writer responds by bolting '...within the Fourth Industrial Revolution' onto sentences, the gate drops them (mechanism not in span) OR they survive as name-drop padding — the exact defect we have. Mitigation: the directive is conditional on evidence support, and the cheap test measures INTEGRATION (frame terms co-occurring with findings in the same paragraph) not raw counts.
changes.test: Outline + intro-section-only generation (two LLM calls): assert (1) the opening section's kept prose discusses the frame across >=1 full paragraph (not a name-drop: frame term co-occurs with >=2 cited findings in-paragraph), (2) body-vs-references split counting (per the brief's trap warning) shows body frame mentions >=8 with >=50% in finding-bearing sentences, (3) kept_fraction for the intro section did not fall below 0.5 (i.e., framing did not trigger the tighter-retry death spiral).

design_v1.thesis: POLARIS is an extraction-grounded fact conveyor whose admission predicate (provenance_generator.py:2930 `is_verified = len(failures) == 0`, with the NEUTRAL clause at entailment_judge.py:588 defining interpretation as failure) structurally forbids the sentence that earns insight — while the capabilities that would fix every one of its four weakest graded surfaces ALREADY EXIST IN THE TREE, dark by default: a purpose-built cross-source synthesis lane off behind three env flags (analyst_synthesis_deviation_check.py:155-203), a verified-numbers comparison-table renderer with no caller wired (presentation_tables.py:23-28), a research-report skeleton outline off behind two flags (multi_section_generator.py:947-1013), and venue metadata already sitting on every bibliography row (provenance_generator.py:4738) that RACE never sees because it only reads running prose. The push to SOTA is therefore not a rewrite: it is (a) lighting the dark lanes, (b) adding ONE genuinely new mechanism — a premise-grounded INFERENCE tier at the exact NEUTRAL branch (provenance_generator.py:2596-2621) that admits hedged interpretation whose every factual premise is span-verified, and (c) moving the report's judge-visible surface (paragraphing at :5064, venue names, sector organization, frame integration) to what the judge actually grades — because length and depth are measured dead, and every remaining point lives in synthesis, structure, and instruction compliance.
design_v1.faithfulness_contract: TWO-TIER ADMISSION CONTRACT. TIER F (FACT) — unchanged, byte-identical when all new flags are off: a sentence is admitted iff it clears every existing leg of verify_sentence_provenance (provenance_generator.py:2098-2959) and `is_verified = len(failures) == 0` (:2930). TIER I (INFERENCE, body, PG_STRICT_VERIFY_INFERENCE_TIER): a sentence reaching the NEUTRAL branch (:2596-2621) is admitted iff ALL of: (1) it cites >=2 distinct evidence rows via provenance tokens — untokened sentences still die at :2186-2193, unchanged; (2) every MECHANICAL leg already passed — these run before entailment and are untouched, so every number, percent, integer, and binding qualifier in the sentence is already verified against the cited spans; (3) the first judge verdict was NEUTRAL — CONTRADICTED remains unconditionally fatal (:2607-2615 posture preserved); (4) the sentence carries an interpretive hedge cue (_INTERPRETIVE_CUE_RE, analyst_synthesis_deviation_check.py:219-226) — a bare categorical assertion is ineligible; (5) no named entity (author, study, organization, venue) appears in the sentence that is absent from the union of the cited rows' full text (reusing _span_grounds_sentence:138-152 and the author-attribution floor at :264-302); (6) a SECOND judge call with a premise-decomposition prompt returns INFERENCE_OK, defined as: every factual assertion in the SENTENCE is present in the SPAN, and the only content not in the SPAN is the hedged interpretive relation over those assertions — any other verdict, and any transport error, FAILS CLOSED to the existing entailment_failed drop (:2919-2923 posture preserved). Every Tier-I keep is tagged soft_warning='inference_tier' in the audit log and counted in telemetry, so the audit can enumerate exactly which sentences carry interpretation. TIER I-S (analyst section, existing dark-lane contract, unchanged from its authors' design): cited synthesis passes the deterministic anti-fabrication floor (every number in the union of cited sources' full text, >=2 content-word overlap); uncited interpretation passes _is_disclosable_interpretation (no decimals, no percent, no quantitative claim, no attribution absent from the pool, hedge cue mandatory); fabricated attributions and unhedged categoricals DROP; the section ships under an explicit interpretive disclosure. WHAT STILL GETS KILLED, everywhere, in every tier: any sentence contradicted by its spans; any unhedged interpretive assertion; any sentence introducing a number, percent, or named entity not groundable in the union of its cited sources; any untokened body sentence; anything on judge transport error. WHY NO HALLUCINATION HOLE OPENS: the only novel content class admitted anywhere is a HEDGED INTERPRETIVE RELATION whose operands are each independently span-verified — numeric and entity fabrication remain blocked by deterministic legs that run BEFORE and independently OF the judge; the change converts exactly one verdict path (NEUTRAL + hedged + premise-verified) from drop to labeled-keep, and every such keep is individually enumerable in the audit log for post-hoc inspection.
design_v1.expected_gain: Honest arithmetic from 0.42-0.43 (treating Rank9/10/11 as one ~0.42 point with ±0.016 noise): midpoint sum of the eight changes is ~+7.6, but C1/C2/C4 overlap (all feed insight) and C6 is partly protective, so the defensible discounted estimate is +5 to +6.5 points -> a landing zone of 0.48-0.50. That RETAKES the published Gemini-2.5-Pro DR number (0.4888) and approaches human parity, but it does NOT reach 0.5265 — we fall an estimated 2.5 to 4.5 points short. The residual is not mechanical and I will not pretend a flag fixes it: (1) the QUALITY of interpretive prose — ADORE and Tavily beat the human reference, which means their synthesis reads BETTER than a human analyst's, and our hedge-mandatory contract deliberately caps assertiveness the judge may reward; (2) single-task measurement — every number here is task-72 with a ±0.016 floor, and the leaderboard averages 100 tasks, so per-task variance alone can eat 1-2 points of apparent gain; (3) the prior negative on insight directives says some fraction of C4/C8's estimate will not materialize. Path to closing the residual if the first wave lands at ~0.49: iterate the analyst-writer model and prompt (the one surface where prose quality is uncapped by the gate), and widen Tier-I eligibility gradually (3+ source inferences, comparative-magnitude claims) only as the audit log proves zero fabrications admitted.
design_v1.kill_rule: A change is DEAD and reverts to default-off if ANY of: (1) its cheap mechanism test fails to prove the mechanism fired — no compose is ever purchased for a mechanism not yet proven live; (2) after two PAIRED composes (change-arm vs same-day control, identical config otherwise), its mean overall gain is <= +0.016 — the measured noise floor; one paired run is never sufficient because Rank9/Rank10 proved identical configs differ by 0.0158; (3) the audit log shows even ONE admitted sentence violating the faithfulness contract (a fabricated number, entity, or attribution, or an unhedged interpretive keep) — killed regardless of score, no appeal; (4) for insight-targeted changes specifically (C1/C2/C4/C8), the insight sub-score moves DOWN in both paired runs — the prior negative (0.4094 vs 0.4447) showed insight interventions can backfire, so insight changes are guilty until proven innocent; (5) body word count exceeds 9,500 judge-visible words (post-ArticleCleaner) — the length lever is measured dead and anything pushing past reference length is presumptively trading density for bulk. Changes are landed ONE ARM AT A TIME in weight order (C1+C6 together as a word-budget pair, then C3, C5, C7, C2, C4, C8); a surviving arm's flags join the control for the next arm, so every measurement stays paired against the best-known config.

Padding purge + shipping-defect hygiene (frees the word budget C1 spends)
Inline venue attribution — the ONLY channel to journal-compliance the judge can see
Question-frame integration (4IR as organizing frame, not scenery)

changes.change: Two moves. (b) INTERPRETIVE WEAVE: ≤1 class-I sentence per paragraph, ≤8% of body sentences, legal only per the faithfulness contract below (no digits, no new named entities, no [n], adjacency+lemma-overlap with ≥2 multi-source FACT sentences, mandatory fail-closed contradiction screen, every keep enumerated verbatim in an audit sidecar). build_plan.thesis: C1 and C2 are DEAD and stay dead — no rebuttal survives contact with the code. I verified the C1 kill shot myself: the scored composer's report assembly (scripts/compose_agentic_report_s3gear329.py:652-668) renders only sr.verified_text + Limitations + References; analyst_synthesis_text never reaches report.md, so the env-only flip is mechanically score-invisible while arming ~100 discarded LLM calls and corrupting total_words. C2's NEUTRAL-keep converts 'span does not support this claim' into a keep with only numeric deterministic backstops, which is the hallucination hole our own pre-registration declared unshippable. The thesis that DOES survive — endorsed independently by all three skeptics as the 'cheaper alternative' — is the pre-registered bundled arm: rebuild the DOCUMENT (H3s, 150-word topic-sentence paragraphs, study tables, bullets) and weave interpretation OVER frozen verified contrasts, at zero added words, implemented as an offline rewrite stage on the banked Rank10 artifact so the whole wave needs ZERO compose runs and is scored 5x-paired against a k=5-pinned baseline. Faithfulness moves from 'one tier with a soft verdict' (refuted) to 'disjoint sentence classes with deterministic membership': facts never bypass the frozen verifier, interpretation is deterministically barred from carrying any checkable factual atom, and everything else fail-closes.
build_plan.faithfulness_contract: Every sentence in the shipped report belongs to exactly ONE class, decided by deterministic checks that run before and independent of any LLM, fail-closed at paragraph granularity (any unclassifiable sentence reverts its whole paragraph to the source text). CLASS F (FACT): either byte-identical to an already-verified sentence (the reflow validator asserts the multiset of citation-bearing sentences is preserved), or a rewritten/fused sentence that re-passes the FULL frozen verify_sentence_provenance gate (provenance_generator.py:2098 — all deterministic numeric legs + entailment) against the union of its parent sentences' cited rows (spans from bibliography.json direct_quotes + corpus); NEUTRAL or any verifier failure = revert to the parent sentences, never keep, never drop content. Only class F may carry [n] citations or numbers. CLASS S (STRUCTURE): headers, transitions, and table cells assembled deterministically from sidecar metadata and verified-sentence substrings — zero LLM-originated factual content by construction. CLASS I (INTERPRETATION — the only new admitted content) is legal iff ALL of: (1) contains no digits, percents, units, or comparative magnitudes; (2) every proper noun / capitalized multi-token span already appears verbatim in the same paragraph's class-F sentences or the task-prompt concept whitelist — this kills fabricated attribution including the single-name/org gap the skeptics found in _AUTHOR_ATTR_RE; (3) carries no citation marker, so it can never masquerade as verified; (4) is adjacent to ≥2 class-F sentences citing ≥2 distinct sources and shares ≥2 content lemmas with them — it must interpret the compared findings, not free-float; (5) uses an epistemic frame and no universal/predictive-certainty pattern; (6) passes a MANDATORY contradiction screen — the existing sentinel judge with the paragraph's class-F sentences as premise, CONTRADICTED = dropped, judge error/timeout = dropped. This is kill-on-contradiction, NOT the refuted keep-on-NEUTRAL: because class I is deterministically barred from carrying any checkable factual atom, NEUTRAL here means 'a hedged relational gloss the premises neither entail nor deny', not 'an ungrounded fact'; (7) volume caps: ≤1 per paragraph, ≤8% of body sentences, and EVERY kept class-I sentence is enumerated verbatim with its premises in the audit sidecar (closing the count-only audit gap the skeptics documented) and manually read before any score is trusted. WHAT STILL GETS KILLED, unconditionally: any new number outside the frozen verifier; any new named actor; any [n] on unverified text; anything a judge calls contradicted; everything when the judge is unavailable; any LLM paraphrase of a class-F sentence that fails re-verification. GUARANTEE: the only wrong-but-shipped content possible is an explicitly hedged, uncited, volume-capped, contradiction-screened relational gloss over correct verified facts — no fabricated fact, number, quote, or attribution can ship, because those are excluded by deterministic string-level checks, not by model judgment. The skeptics' four concrete attacks (polarity inversion of the 14% finding, Goldman-Sachs attribution, cross-source number transplant, 'replace all lawyers') are encoded as permanent regression tests that must all DROP before any judge call is spent. The report preamble's verification claim (compose_agentic_report_s3gear329.py:644-651) is amended, not softened: it additionally discloses that connective interpretive sentences carry no citations and no quantitative claims.
build_plan.expected_gain: Honest accounting from the TRUE baseline ~0.42 (Rank9/10/11 mean; quoting Rank10's 0.4313 is the luckiest draw): W1 structure +0.005-0.012, W2 interpretive weave +0.006-0.016, W3 tables +0.001-0.004, W4 confession purge +0.001-0.003, W5 4IR framing +0.003-0.008. Bundle point estimate +0.02 to +0.04 overall → ~0.44-0.46. This DOES NOT reach 0.5265 — it falls ~0.07-0.09 short, and saying so is part of the plan. The residual lives in three places wave 1 deliberately does not touch: (a) comprehensiveness 'Scope of Industry-Specific Analysis' (w=0.25 of 0.29) — we have ZERO industry-organized content, and fixing it means regrouping evidence into a sectoral section at the outline seam, a compose-level change; (b) IF 'Exclusive Citation of High-Quality Journal Articles' (w=0.15 of 0.25) — post-ArticleCleaner the ONLY scoring path is venue names written into running prose, deterministically checkable against row metadata; (c) the deep one: the reference converts evidence into an ARGUMENT — a wave 2 would have to rebuild composition around comparison-matrix bundles (normalize by technology/unit-of-analysis/outcome/horizon, write from bundles not source cards) so synthesis is the unit of generation, not a post-hoc weave. Even a successful wave 2 honestly projects ~0.47-0.50; the last ~0.03 to ADORE's 0.5265 (a 100-task mean vs our n=1 task, so the comparison itself is soft) has no evidenced lever tonight. If wave 1's paired delta comes back <+0.008, even that ladder is dead and the honest report is 'task-72 RACE is insensitive to everything we can faithfully change.'
build_plan.kill_rule: PRE-REGISTERED BEFORE ANY SCORING, in order: (0) INSTRUMENT GATE — W0's k=5 identical-artifact rescore first; if per-call SD > 0.020, STOP all scoring-driven work (no lever we own is resolvable) and fix the instrument before touching code. (1) MECHANISM GATE — no judge call is spent until every W1-W5 deterministic test is green on the CLEANED artifact and I have read 100% of the enumerated class-I sentences; the four skeptic attack cases must all DROP. (2) SHIP GATE — the bundle ships iff 5x-paired mean delta vs the pinned Rank10 baseline ≥ +0.010 (SE ~0.008). (3) DEATH GATE — if paired delta < +0.008, the structure+prose-mode thesis is DEAD ON THIS TASK: no variant iteration, no wave 2 built on it, write the negative result and escalate to the operator with the two remaining options (argument-first composer rebuild, or accept ~0.43 and redirect effort to the 100-task generalization where task-72 overfitting is worthless anyway). (4) FAITHFULNESS TRUMP — if ANY shipped sentence is found (regression test, audit read, or spot check) to carry a fabricated fact, number, or attribution, class I is stripped permanently regardless of score and the arm re-runs structure-only; the moat is not for sale. (5) SUNK-COST BOUND — wave 1 is ≤1 build-day and judge-calls-only (zero 65-minute composes; the entire arm runs on the banked outputs/rank10_sections_compose artifact); if the build itself exceeds that, the complexity is the warning and we stop and reassess. C1 and C2 remain dropped permanently unless someone produces code, not prose, that closes every enumerated hole.
